plan.failureSummary: The test failed in DETERMINISTIC mode because it attempted to click a 'Select your occupation' button that does not exist in the current UI state. The failure screenshot shows an 'Age Group' section with radio buttons instead.
observedIndicators: Visual mismatch: tool call expected 'Select your occupation' but screenshot shows 'Age Group' radio buttons
History shows a pattern of failures followed by successes, typical of structural UI changes in deterministic runs

remediationSteps.summary: Clear AI cache and retry test
remediationSteps.details: Execute the test with the 'clearPageAiCache' directive. This will force the AI to re-examine the page structure rather than relying on the outdated deterministic cache.

plan.notes: This is a classic stale cache scenario on a dynamic or 'unstable' survey form. The AI had previously learned a path that included an occupation dropdown, but the current page layout has changed to include age group radios instead. Clearing the cache will allow the AI to re-analyze the page and satisfy the flexible semantic intent of 'filling out all survey questions'.
